# Workspace Instructions

## UI/UX Direction

For any frontend, layout, styling, or component work in this repository, prefer the cyberpunk / glitch design system defined in [.github/prompts/style.prompt.md](.github/prompts/style.prompt.md).

## Practical Guidance

- Keep visual language dark, neon, technical, and high-contrast.
- Centralize design tokens instead of scattering one-off colors or shadows.
- Favor reusable components and consistent naming over page-specific styling.
- Preserve accessibility, responsive behavior, and reduced-motion support.
- Match existing stack patterns first: React, Vite, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, and Framer Motion.

## Scope

Apply this guidance to UI-related changes. Do not force the aesthetic onto unrelated backend, Firebase, or utility work unless the task touches presentation.
